caption.full:
Jennifer Lawrence returns to dark brunette hair.

Jennifer Lawrence debuted her darkest hair color in over a decade on July 9 in New York City. The style, featuring face-framing bangs, echoes her look from the 2012 film Silver Linings Playbook. She plans a breast augmentation to prepare for a nude scene next spring.

Send this to your friend who loves Jennifer Lawrence!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

caption.firstComment: Her shift back to dark hair and talking openly about postpartum change reminds me of Silver Linings Playbook — makes me wonder how much the new nude scene matters to the role or if it’s more personal.

youtube.title: Jennifer Lawrence: Dark Hair & Breast Augmentation Plans
youtube.description:
Jennifer Lawrence debuted her darkest hair color in over a decade on July 9 in New York City, a look reminiscent of her Silver Linings Playbook role. The actress revealed plans for a breast augmentation to prepare for a nude scene filming next spring. She also discussed postpartum body changes and future cosmetic procedures.
